testcase.name: test_get_notifications

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'notifications': [{'created_at': '2026-03-08T00:11:29.118000', 'id': '9918ee9e-8c5d-4423-bcf7-46eff1c088e3', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'RelaterTest relates to your problem', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T21:09:06.967000', 'id': 'd1d8d873-93a7-4ad5-b226-41786a42d6f2', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:08:46.750000', 'id': 'de9b0753-e8af-4dfe-b754-07c7dccd16eb', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:08:39.524000', 'id': 'b7766fb8-6f1f-40e6-af6e-451981c88283', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:08:11.734000', 'id': '635aac3b-c393-4a41-86d9-671831071209', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:07:44.944000', 'id': '0e9255ab-2811-4a36-839f-9d33b9a3c113', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}], 'unread_count': 0}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_e2e.py:988: in test_get_notifications assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'notifications': [{'created_at': '2026-03-08T00:11:29.118000', 'id': '9918ee9e-8c5d-4423-bcf7-46eff1c088e3', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'RelaterTest relates to your problem', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T21:09:06.967000', 'id': 'd1d8d873-93a7-4ad5-b226-41786a42d6f2', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:08:46.750000', 'id': 'de9b0753-e8af-4dfe-b754-07c7dccd16eb', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:08:39.524000', 'id': 'b7766fb8-6f1f-40e6-af6e-451981c88283', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:08:11.734000', 'id': '635aac3b-c393-4a41-86d9-671831071209', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-14T20:07:44.944000', 'id': '0e9255ab-2811-4a36-839f-9d33b9a3c113', 'is_read': True, 'message': 'New feedback from Test Feedback User', ...}], 'unread_count': 0}, list)
